## Checklist

- [ ] Backend gates pass: `pytest`, `ruff check .`, `ruff format --check .`, `mypy app`
- [ ] Frontend gates pass: `npm run build` (tsc), `npm run lint`, `npm test`
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behaviour changes (especially engine / statistics / API)
- [ ] Updated docs where behaviour, configuration, or the build changed
- [ ] Preserves the design principles: local-first, offline, no telemetry/cloud/external calls, loopback-only backend
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the DCO
